source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Drops powerful sea mines that seek out and destroy Bloons.

3.description: Naval Tactics: greatly increases attack speed of Brickell and nearby Monkey Subs and Monkey Buccaneers for a short time.

4.description: More popping power for Sea Mines.

5.description: Naval Tactics increases popping power and allows affected Monkeys to hit all Bloon types except Camo.

6.description: Increases the damage of Sea Mines and Pistol attacks.

7.description: Blast Chain: Sea mines fire off quicker for a short time. Brickell gains increased attack range and Camo Bloon detection.

8.description: Naval Tactics allows affected Monkeys to hit Camo Bloons. Water towers in radius gain extra pierce.

10.description: Mega Mine: deploys to any water area a devastating Mine that triggers on MOABs and stuns nearby Bloons. Mega Mines last 3 rounds.

11.description: Faster deploy speed and deploy rate for Sea Mines.

12.description: Pistol attack increased speed and damage, Sea Mines increased damage.

15.description: Enhanced Sea Mines have larger explosion, can damage Black Bloons and remove Camo property. Pistol does more damage.

16.description: Attack and Sea Mine deploy range increased slightly.

17.description: Sea Mines do greatly increased damage. Pistol does more damage.

18.description: Mega Mine cooldown reduced even further.

19.description: Naval Tactics affects all water based towers everywhere.

20.description: Mega Mine does massively increased damage and longer stun.
